# Skill: Requirements Discovery

## When to use
- When a request is underspecified
- Before starting a new feature or project phase
- When acceptance criteria, scope boundaries, or user workflows are unclear

## What to do
1) Identify the minimal set of open questions that block sound implementation.
2) Capture actors, critical workflows, constraints, and out-of-scope items.
3) Make non-functional requirements explicit where relevant: security, performance, compliance, support, and observability.
4) Convert the result into bounded acceptance criteria and record key decisions in `docs/ai/PLAN.md`, `docs/ai/STATUS.md`, and `docs/ai/DECISIONS.md`.

## References (repo)
- `docs/ai/PLAN.md`
- `docs/ai/STATUS.md`
- `docs/ai/DECISIONS.md`
